first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the core reasoning for the low score is the same in both evaluations: the candidate lacks the required Java/Kotlin/JVM expertise. The differences in the 'strengths' and 'concerns' sections are minor rephrasings of the same points and fall well within the range of normal run-to-run variation. There is no language in the variant evaluation that suggests the change in location from Berlin to Bangalore influenced the assessment.
